ain: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Ainu.
ani: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Andi.
can: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Chambri.
canso: noun. A love song sung by a troubadour
casino: noun. A public building or room for gambling.
cis: symbol. The function c i s (x) = cos ⁡ x + i sin ⁡ x {\displaystyle \mathrm {cis} (x)=\cos x+i\sin x}.
cisco: noun. Any North American freshwater fish of certain species of the genus Coregonus that live in cold-water lakes.
coca: noun. Any of the four cultivated plants which belong to the family Erythroxylaceae, native to western South America.
cocoa: noun. The dried and partially fermented fatty seeds of the cacao tree from which chocolate is made.
coin: noun. A piece of currency, usually metallic and in the shape of a disc, but sometimes polygonal, or with a hole in the middle.
con: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Cofán.
conics: noun. The branch of geometry which treats of the cone and the curves which arise from its sections.
coo: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Comox.
coos: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of coo
icon: noun. An image, symbol, picture, portrait, or other representation, usually as an object of religious devotion.
ins: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Indian Sign Language.
ion: noun. An atom or group of atoms bearing an electrical charge, such as the sodium and chlorine atoms in a salt solution.
naos: noun. The inner part of an ancient Greek temple, containing a statue of the temple's deity and surrounded by a colonnaded portico; the
nos: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Eastern Nisu.
oca: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ocaina.
occasion: noun. A favorable opportunity; a convenient or timely chance.
ons: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ono.
sac: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Fox.
sain: verb. To make the sign of the cross on or over something or someone.
scan: verb. To examine sequentially, carefully, or critically; to scrutinize; to behold closely.
scion: noun. A descendant, especially a first-generation descendant of a distinguished family.
sic: symbol. Former ISO 639-3 language code for Malinguat.
son: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-5 language code for Songhay languages.
sonic: adjective. Of or relating to sound.
soon: adjective. Short in length of time from the present.
